ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Joe Birts.

There were no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
